scheme_name: Purchase of Vehicle for Commercial Hiring Purpose for Persons with Disabilities
page_title: Purchase of Vehicle for Commercial Hiring Purpose for Persons with Disabilities

details: The scheme "Purchase of Vehicle for Commercial Hiring Purpose for Persons with Disabilities" is implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes and Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam, Government of Haryana. Under the scheme, loans are provided to differently-abled persons for commercial hiring purposes up to ₹10.00 lakhs, and for the purchase of special category vehicles like JCBs, trucks, road rollers, etc., loans up to ₹25.00 lakhs are available. Permanent residents of Haryana with a disability of 40% or more are eligible to avail the benefits under this scheme.
benefits: Under this scheme, loans are provided to differently abled persons for commercial hiring up to ₹10,000,00/- and for purchasing special category vehicles such as JCB, Trucks, Road rollers, etc., with loans up to ₹25,000,00/-.
eligibility: The applicant should be a permanent resident of Haryana.
The applicant should have a disability of at least 40%.
The age of the applicant should be above 18 years. For persons with mental retardation, the age is relaxed to 14 years instead of the usual 18 years.
License is applicable as per the policy of the National Corporation.

online: Registration Process on Antyodaya-SARAL Portal:
Step 01:
The eligible applicant may apply online through the Official Portal- Antyodaya-SARAL Portal.
https://saralharyana.gov.in/
Step 02:
If the applicant is not registered on the portal, he/she gets registered there.
Step 03:
For registration, click “
New User
” under ‘Sign In Here’ and fill in all the mandatory details i.e. Name, Email ID, Mobile Number, Password & State. Click on ‘Submit’.
Step 04:
Verify your mobile number and email ID through the received OTP and complete the registration process.
Login to apply for the scheme:
To avail the benefits of the scheme, visit the Official
Antyodaya-SARAL Portal
and log in through the email ID used while registering.
Enter Password & Captcha and click on ‘Login’.
After successful login, click on ‘Apply for Services’ and then ‘View all Available Services’
Now, you can search for the scheme and click on the scheme to go ahead and fill out the application form.
Step 05:
Fill in all the mandatory details and upload all the mandatory documents.
Step 06:
Preview the application form and click on ‘Submit’.
Tracking of Application:
Applicants can track their applications through the Official
by entering their Department Name, Scheme Name, and Application Reference ID.

documents_required: 1. Identity/Citizenship Proof (Any one of the following):
2. Age Proof (Any one of the following):
3. Resident Proof/Address Proof/Ownership Proof (Any one of the following):
4. Caste / Religion Proof (Any one of the following):
5. Disability Proof (Any one of the following):
• Disability Certificate (Disability should not be less than 40%)

faqs.question: What is the maximum loan amount available for commercial hiring vehicles?
faqs.answer: Loans up to ₹10.00 lakhs are available for commercial hiring vehicles.

faqs.question: What is the maximum loan amount available for special category vehicles?
faqs.answer: Loans up to ₹25.00 lakhs are available for special category vehicles like JCBs, trucks, and road rollers.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Permanent residents of Haryana with a disability of 40% or more are eligible.

faqs.question: What is the minimum age requirement for applicants?
faqs.answer: The applicant should be above 18 years old. For persons with mental retardation, the minimum age is 14 years.

faqs.question: Can a mentally retarded person apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Yes, they can apply, and the minimum age requirement for them is 14 years.

faqs.question: How can one apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Eligible applicants can apply online through the Official Antyodaya-SARAL Portal (https://saralharyana.gov.in/).

faqs.question: Where can one track their application status?
faqs.answer: Applicants can track their application status on the Official Antyodaya-SARAL Portal (https://status.saralharyana.nic.in/) using the Department Name, Scheme Name, and Application Reference ID.

faqs.question: What type of vehicles can be purchased under the special category vehicle loan?
faqs.answer: Special category vehicles include JCBs, trucks, road rollers, etc.
